work_sessions.description: DollarFS v0.1.1 security patch, WASM Layer C verification, CollateralOps dashboard + packet export, proof bundle creation, Membra Proof-of-Inference kernel

Vercel deployment debug: 500 FUNCTION_INVOCATION_FAILED, 401 Deployment Protection/SSO, daily deploy limit (>100/day), Hugging Face token exposure, SQLAlchemy 2.0 fixes, /tmp SQLite for serverless, python-multipart dependency, merge conflict resolution, 8 new backend modules, 40+ API endpoints, local import test verification
blockers_encountered: Vercel: daily deploy limit exceeded (>100/day). Redeploys blocked 24h.
Vercel: Deployment Protection / SSO returns 401 on public alias.
Hugging Face: token exposed in session log. Must rotate immediately.
Hugging Face: Space build unverified after deployment.
Collateral engine: P0 required files missing for practical-shaw-2f188a system.

security_incidents.description: Hugging Face access token was pasted into agent chat log.
security_incidents.remediation: Revoke leaked token from HF Settings -> Access Tokens. Create new token. Update Space secret. Do not paste tokens into chat logs.

lessons_learned: Deployment protection is a useful safety feature, but blocks public API access during debugging.
Rate limits are real; batch fixes before redeploying.
Token hygiene must be enforced before any agent session starts.
Local import tests are faster and cheaper than cloud deploy loops.
